brand_explorer_rinvoq.name: Brand Explorer Item
brand_explorer_rinvoq.description: Treatment for rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, and more.
brand_explorer_rinvoq.safetyText: Please see Important Safety Information, including BOXED WARNING on Serious Infections, Mortality, Malignancies, Major Adverse Cardiovascular Events, and Thrombosis.
brand_explorer_rinvoq.indications:
Rheumatoid Arthritis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/rheumatoid-arthritis|moderate
Psoriatic Arthritis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/psoriatic-arthritis|active
Ankylosing Spondylitis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/axspa|active
Non-radiographic Axial Spondyloarthritis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/axspa|active
Giant Cell Arteritis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/giant-cell-arteritis|
Atopic Dermatitis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/atopic-dermatitis|refractory
Ulcerative Colitis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/ulcerative-colitis|moderate
Crohn's Disease|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/crohns-disease|moderate

brand_explorer_skyrizi.name: Brand Explorer Item
brand_explorer_skyrizi.description: Treatment for plaque psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, and more.

brand_explorer_humira.name: Brand Explorer Item
brand_explorer_humira.safetyText: Please see Important Safety Information, including BOXED WARNING on Serious Infections and Malignancy.
brand_explorer_humira.indications:
Hidradenitis Suppurativa|https://www.humirapro.com/hidradenitis-suppurativa|moderate
Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis|https://www.humirapro.com/jia|moderate
Pediatric Crohn's Disease|https://www.humirapro.com/pediatric-crohns-disease|moderate
Pediatric Ulcerative Colitis|https://www.humirapro.com/pediatric-ulcerative-colitis|moderate
Pediatric Uveitis|https://www.humirapro.com/uveitis-pediatric|noninfectious
Uveitis (Adult)|https://www.humirapro.com/uveitis|noninfectious
Other Indications|https://www.humirapro.com/|

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Variant
fields.description: Visual layout variant for the brand explorer.

options.name: Default (Full explorer with therapeutic filter tabs)

fields.name: anchorId
fields.label: Anchor ID
fields.description: Optional anchor ID for deep linking to this block.

fields.name: barLabel
fields.label: Bar Label
fields.description: Text shown on the fixed bottom bar trigger button.

fields.name: therapeuticArea
fields.label: Therapeutic Area
fields.description: Category for filter tabs (e.g., Immunology, Dermatology, Gastroenterology).

fields.name: safetyText
fields.label: Safety Text
fields.description: Safety disclaimer shown below the brand logo.

fields.name: indications
fields.label: Indications
fields.description: One per line: Name|URL|severity (moderate/active/refractory/noninfectious). Example: Rheumatoid Arthritis|https://www.rinvoqhcp.com/rheumatoid-arthritis|moderate
